final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 character expression grid for 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传.

Style/medium: needs a "3D animation" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar character design heritage, 2000s DreamWorks expressive rigging, modern Chinese 3D animated feature film character styling; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3×3 grid layout, 9 panels total, each panel showing 赵灵儿 with consistent framing through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 (young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses) in 9 different expressions/outfits:
  top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper hole framing across all 9 panels as the common visual device
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, friendly animated character mood — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 赵灵儿 IP identity from 仙剑奇侠传, 9 panels clearly divided, consistent character base across all expressions
Avoid:
